title: Enhancing Reasoning Efficiency in DeepSeek-R1
description: Investigates techniques to improve the reasoning efficiency of DeepSeek-R1, a large language model, focusing on reducing computational overhead while maintaining accuracy across complex reasoning benchmarks.

title: Semantic Search on Peloton Data
journal_full: International Journal of Latest Research in Patterns
description: Applies semantic search and vector embedding techniques to Peloton fitness datasets, demonstrating how NLP-driven information retrieval outperforms keyword-based search in health and wellness domains.

title: Dynamic Hand Gesture Recognition for Sign Language
journal_full: International Journal of Intelligent Systems and Applications in Engineering
description: Presents a deep learning pipeline for real-time hand gesture recognition targeting sign language interpretation, combining convolutional and recurrent architectures to handle temporal dynamics.

title: Smart Retail Ensemble Techniques for Customer Analysis
journal_full: Journal of Computational Analysis and Applications
description: Proposes ensemble machine learning methods for customer behaviour analysis in smart retail environments, integrating transactional and demographic data to improve predictive accuracy for personalisation.
